title: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: The controlled file is SV-2048 at Revision D.
SV-2048 was prepared 08 Jul 2026 and became effective 10 Jul 2026 at 09:30 MST.
The controlled sites are Phoenix and Tucson, coordinated by Avery Kim.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: The transfer covers eligible Phoenix and Tucson inventory.
The change covers telemetry migration, physical custody, invoice routing, and later credential closure.
Quarantined inventory remains under Northstar quality control.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: Source priority is page 5 final authorization, page 4 exception register, page 3 finance validation, page 2 workplan, then reference notes.
Page 5 controls GO/HOLD state and release conditions but not individual rate details.
Page 4 controls exception scope, owner, and closure evidence but not the commercial ceiling.
Page 3 controls the authorized cost ceiling and invoice route but not operational release.
Page 2 controls task sequence, windows, and task gates but not final authorization.
Email and meeting notes provide context only when cited and cannot approve or close an item.
A lower-priority record may supply detail but cannot reverse a higher-priority state; closure applies only to the obligation named in an exception row.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: Review proceeds from cutover lead to finance to functional owners to sponsor and quality.
The workflow exits through page 2 workplan, page 3 validation, page 4 register, then page 5 final record.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: The region preserves the source field schema in order: ID, Site / asset, Activity, Owner, Planned window, Gate / evidence, State.
The source row order is recoverable as: T-01 -> T-02 -> T-03 -> T-04 -> T-05 -> T-06.
For T-01, Activity is Reserve the temperature-controlled bay; retain Kestrel access until EX-07 is signed..

value: Reserve the temperature-controlled bay; retain Kestrel access until EX-07 is signed.

leaves.expectation: For T-02, Activity is Move telemetry from Kestrel gateway KG-2 to Boreal gateway BG-5; preserve 15-minute data..

value: Move telemetry from Kestrel gateway KG-2 to Boreal gateway BG-5; preserve 15-minute data.

leaves.expectation: For T-02, Gate / evidence is Parallel-read delta <=0.3 C for 30 minutes.
For T-04, Activity is Transfer 48 pallets only after the T-02 telemetry gate passes..

value: Transfer 48 pallets only after the T-02 telemetry gate passes.

leaves.expectation: For T-04, State is BLOCKED BY T-02.
For T-05, Activity is Transfer 26 pallets and exclude six quarantined cases held under QA-61..

value: Transfer 26 pallets and exclude six quarantined cases held under QA-61.

leaves.expectation: For T-05, Gate / evidence is QA release QR-203 for eligible stock.

value: QA release QR-203 for eligible stock

leaves.expectation: For T-06, Activity is Close Kestrel credentials after inventory reconciliation and legal waiver confirmation..

value: Close Kestrel credentials after inventory reconciliation and legal waiver confirmation.

leaves.expectation: For T-06, Gate / evidence is REC-2048 has zero unresolved items and EX-07 is signed.

value: REC-2048 has zero unresolved items and EX-07 is signed

leaves.expectation: For T-06, State is PENDING.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: Avery Kim's 08 Jul sidebar says to keep Kestrel Dock 4 access active until counsel signs EX-07.
The sidebar is advisory and says page 5 controls release.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: T-02 gates the T-04 transfer of PX-771.
EX-07 blocks T-06 credential closure but does not block physical transfer.
T-05 may move only eligible Tucson stock while six QA-61 cases stay segregated.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: Reconstruct the logical order: workplan table, approver sidebar, dependency interpretation, handoff matrix, then rollback trigger.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: The region preserves the source field schema in order: Trigger, Notify, Channel, Required content.
The source row order is recoverable as: T-02 passes -> T-04 completes -> Any temperature breach -> Rollback invoked.
For T-02 passes, Required content is P-14 delta and validation end time.

value: P-14 delta and validation end time

leaves.expectation: For T-04 completes, Required content is PX-771 pallet count and orphan count.

value: PX-771 pallet count and orphan count

leaves.expectation: For Any temperature breach, Required content is Sensor, duration, peak delta, and lot.

value: Sensor, duration, peak delta, and lot

leaves.expectation: For Rollback invoked, Required content is Last completed task and custody location.

value: Last completed task and custody location

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: RB-12 is invoked for a temperature deviation above 1.0 C lasting 10 continuous minutes.
Rollback stops the active transfer and preserves custody at the last confirmed location.
The last completed task must be reported on bridge BR-2048.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: The region preserves the source field schema in order: Line, Basis, Amount, Approval condition.
The source row order is recoverable as: Boreal implementation -> Kestrel overlap -> Sensor validation -> Contingency.
For Boreal implementation, Amount is $18,600.
For Kestrel overlap, Amount is $4,320.
For Kestrel overlap, Approval condition is Maximum two nights.
For Sensor validation, Amount is $2,150.
For Contingency, Amount is $3,000.
For Contingency, Approval condition is Available only if EX-07 extends.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: The region preserves the source field schema in order: Control, Value, Interpretation.
The source row order is recoverable as: Base committed cost -> Conditional contingency -> Not-to-exceed ceiling.
For Base committed cost, Value is $25,070.
For Conditional contingency, Value is $3,000.
For Conditional contingency, Interpretation is Usable only while EX-07 extends the overlap.

value: Usable only while EX-07 extends the overlap

leaves.expectation: For Not-to-exceed ceiling, Value is $28,070.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: The region preserves the source field schema in order: Vendor, PO, Cost center, Reviewer, Route.
The source row order is recoverable as: Boreal Storage -> Kestrel Logistics -> ThermoVision.
For Boreal Storage, PO is 44018-3.
For Boreal Storage, Route is AP-West / transition.
For Kestrel Logistics, PO is 44007-9.
For ThermoVision, PO is 43991-2.
For ThermoVision, Route is AP-Quality / validation.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: Finance validates the cost ceiling and invoice route.
Finance does not close exceptions, satisfy task gates, or authorize physical release.
Unused contingency is not committed spend.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: The finance-validation stamp records Jonah Mercer on 09 Jul 2026 at 16:42 MST.
The finance-validation stamp names control VC-2048.
The finance-validation stamp says cost validation is not operational release.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: The region preserves the source field schema in order: Exception, Affected obligation, Current finding, Owner, Due, Accepted closure evidence, State.
The source row order is recoverable as: E-05 -> EX-07 -> E-08 -> E-09 -> E-11 -> E-12.
For E-05, State is CLOSED.
For EX-07, Affected obligation is T-06 credential closure.
For EX-07, Accepted closure evidence is Countersigned waiver WA-771.
For EX-07, State is OPEN.
For E-08, Current finding is Six QA-61 cases remain quarantined and are outside the eligible transfer quantity..

value: Six QA-61 cases remain quarantined and are outside the eligible transfer quantity.

leaves.expectation: For E-08, Accepted closure evidence is QR-203 release or segregated custody receipt.

value: QR-203 release or segregated custody receipt

leaves.expectation: For E-08, State is OPEN - EXCLUDE.
For E-09, State is CLOSED.
For E-11, Current finding is Carrier arrival is forecast at 01:10, ten minutes after the planned count window..

value: Carrier arrival is forecast at 01:10, ten minutes after the planned count window.

leaves.expectation: For E-11, State is WATCH.
For E-12, State is CLOSED.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: CLOSED means listed evidence was accepted for that row and has no effect on unrelated exceptions.
OPEN - EXCLUDE keeps affected inventory out while eligible inventory may proceed.
WATCH requires monitoring the evidence channel and continues unless a final condition fails.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: A closed row has no effect on unrelated exceptions.
Email acknowledgment is context unless the relevant row cites it as accepted evidence.
Page 5 controls GO/HOLD state while page 3 finance validation controls cost only.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: Physical cutover is GO beginning 14 Jul 2026 at 22:00 MST for eligible inventory only.
Kestrel credential decommission remains HOLD until condition C-3 is satisfied.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: The region preserves the source field schema in order: Condition, Required state before action, Action governed, Failure response.
The source row order is recoverable as: C-1 -> C-2 -> C-3 -> C-4.
For C-1, Required state before action is P-14 parallel-read delta <=0.3 C for 30 minutes.

value: P-14 parallel-read delta <=0.3 C for 30 minutes

leaves.expectation: For C-1, Action governed is Start T-04.
For C-1, Failure response is Hold PX-771 at Phoenix.
For C-2, Required state before action is Six QA-61 cases remain segregated unless QR-203 releases them.

value: Six QA-61 cases remain segregated unless QR-203 releases them

leaves.expectation: For C-2, Action governed is Start T-05.
For C-2, Failure response is Move eligible stock only.
For C-3, Required state before action is EX-07 signed and REC-2048 has zero unresolved items.

value: EX-07 signed and REC-2048 has zero unresolved items

leaves.expectation: For C-3, Action governed is Close Kestrel credentials.
For C-3, Failure response is Retain access and escalate.
For C-4, Required state before action is No temperature deviation >1.0 C for 10 continuous minutes.

value: No temperature deviation >1.0 C for 10 continuous minutes

leaves.expectation: For C-4, Action governed is Continue physical transfer.
For C-4, Failure response is Invoke rollback RB-12.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: The GO decision does not close EX-07.
The GO decision does not release the six QA-61 cases.
The GO decision does not waive telemetry or rollback gates.
Page 4 remains the source for exception ownership and closure evidence.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: The region preserves the source field schema in order: Role, Name, Decision, Recorded.
The source row order is recoverable as: Executive sponsor -> Cutover lead -> Quality -> Legal exception owner.
For Executive sponsor, Decision is Approved.
For Executive sponsor, Recorded is 10 Jul 2026 09:12 MST.
For Cutover lead, Decision is Accepted.
For Quality, Decision is Approved with QA-61 exclusion.
For Quality, Recorded is 10 Jul 2026 09:26 MST.
For Legal exception owner, Decision is EX-07 remains open; not a release signature.

value: EX-07 remains open; not a release signature

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: Revision D supersedes Draft C.
The authorization became effective at 10 Jul 2026 09:30 MST.
The next control event is the first failed condition, completed rollback, or closure of C-3.
